title: Crunchy Crunchy Advancements
description: No more advancements! Removes, Hides, and configurably takes a bite out of the advancements system, without breaking mods.
body:
Takes a configurably-large bite out of advancements.
Requires Connector on (neo)forge.
Works well with EMI.
## Features **Crunchy Crunchy Advancements** is a mod that, by default: - Removes the advancements button on the pause screen - Unbinds and removes the advancements keybind from options - Disables toast notifications for advancements and recipe unlocks - Prevents chat announcements for advancements - Prevents recipe advancements from loading ## Configuration Crunchy Crunchy can be configured via `config/crunchy_crunchy_advancements.toml`, including: - What advancements should be filtered from loading (with blacklist/whitelist modes) - Toggles for each of the above default features Mods like Patchouli require advancements for progression, so this mod doesn't remove all advancements by default.
To load even fewer advancements, swap to whitelist mode and individually filter these mods by namespace. ## Afterword All mods are built on the work of many others. This mod is included in [Tinkerer's Quilt](https://modrinth.com/modpack/tinkerers-quilt) - which adds its own vanilla quest tree. We're open to better ways to implement our mods. If you see something odd and have an idea, let us know!
